name: GT-Pprops
source: Prior VALIDATED registry lemma lem-P-properties (proofs/lem-P-properties/export.md, root node 1). For eta<=eta_0<1/4: P=theta(2Phi-1) satisfies P^2=P (so x-P(x) in Ker P for all x; and P(x) in Im P=A), P(1)=1, P real-linear on B(H)_sa, ||P||<=1+C eta (operator norm: ||P(z)||<=(1+C eta)||z|| for all z in B(H)_sa).
